Meaning.Vi: Tờ giấy (vật liệu làm từ bột gỗ hoặc sợi thực vật)
Meaning.En: A thin material produced from pulp, typically used for writing, printing, or wrapping.
Meaning.Example: She wrote her notes on a sheet of blank paper.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng giấy để ghi chép hoặc in ấn.
Situation.En: Using paper for writing, printing, or drawing.

Situation.Vi: Giấy tái chế để bảo vệ môi trường.
Situation.En: Recycled paper used for environmental sustainability.

Meaning.Vi: Bài báo học thuật; luận văn
Meaning.En: A written document, especially one presenting research or analysis, often published in an academic journal.
Meaning.Example: He presented his findings in a research paper at the conference.

Situation.Vi: Sinh viên viết luận văn tốt nghiệp.
Situation.En: A student writing a graduation thesis or academic paper.

Meaning.Vi: Tờ báo (tờ in của một số báo)
Meaning.En: A newspaper; a printed publication containing news, articles, and advertisements.
Meaning.Example: I read the sports section in the morning paper.

Situation.Vi: Đọc báo mỗi sáng để cập nhật tin tức.
Situation.En: Reading a newspaper daily to stay informed about current events.
